title: rubus mitigatus
intro: Rubus mitigatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of shrub native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus mitigatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Rubus mitigatus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
